acceptance_criteria.text: AI visibility remarks are fixed for served LocalOS pages: static root JSON-LD, route-specific article JSON-LD in raw HTML, non-localhost OG image, updated sitemap lastmod, and open crawler access.
proof: cd frontend && npm run build passed
Flask test client confirmed Article JSON-LD in raw article HTML
Production frontend and backend deploys completed
curl https://localos.pro/ confirmed Organization/WebSite/SoftwareApplication JSON-LD and production OG image
curl article URL confirmed Article JSON-LD, canonical, og:type=article, dateModified=2026-05-19
curl sitemap.xml confirmed 2026-05-19 lastmod values for updated pages
gaps: Search and AI assistant caches may update only after recrawl.

known_gaps: External recrawl latency is outside LocalOS runtime.
